notes: Conflicting workflow changes in concurrent PR
LICENSE file deleted by prior commit in same batch
Permissions already present — scanner read stale cache
GitHub API rate limit hit during batch dispatch
Fix script produced invalid shell syntax in generated patch
Removing hardcoded secret broke integration test expecting that value
Actions already SHA-pinned — scanner matched comment, not actual ref
Existing workflow had non-standard YAML anchors that broke parser
Replacing eval changed runtime behaviour — dynamic dispatch required
CI pipeline timed out validating the fix PR
Scanner matched SPDX in vendored dependency, not project code
Internal service does not have TLS cert — HTTPS upgrade broke connectivity
Quoting prevented intentional glob expansion in deployment script
Secondary rate limit during large batch run
textContent replacement broke HTML rendering in notification component
SECURITY.md exists at .github/SECURITY.md — scanner checked wrong path
Dynamic table name cannot be parameterized — needs allowlist approach
Adding defer close caused use-after-close in concurrent goroutine
Event loop is intentionally unbounded — it's the main server loop
mktemp directory not writable in CI container environment
Safe coercion wrapper introduced new type error at call site
deno.land registry unreachable during version resolution
Restricting CORS origin broke localhost development workflow
Heredoc install is in a Containerfile RUN with pinned hash — already safe
believe_me used as placeholder for genuinely undecidable proof — needs design change
Match arm needs ? operator, not just pattern match — error must propagate
File is vendored MIT code — PMPL header would be wrong license
Code uses custom deserializer with validation — scanner missed the safety wrapper
Repository is archived — cannot push permission fixes
Escaping shell args broke argument parsing for legitimate special characters
TODO in README is intentional documentation, not forgotten code
String.to_atom needed for Erlang interop — to_existing_atom fails at startup
Enumerating minimum permissions took too long — 200+ API calls
Action repo was deleted/renamed — SHA lookup returned 404
sorry placeholder requires advanced tactic — beyond auto-fix capability
Adding error check changed control flow — downstream code assumed success
Composite action needs broader permissions than individual workflow
Matched string is a public API endpoint URL, not a secret
Dynamic apply is the correct pattern here — callback module unknown at compile time
Upstream caller uses catch_unwind — returning Result broke the error handling contract
DNS resolution failed during HTTPS verification check
Submodule is intentional — game assets maintained in separate repo
Safe wrapper changed calling convention — segfault in C library
Repo uses custom hypatia-scan.yml which covers SAST — adding CodeQL is redundant
File is dual-licensed MIT/Apache — adding PMPL header would be incorrect
API timeout during permissions metadata fetch
DOMPurify sanitizer removed legitimate SVG elements from UI
Quoting $@ prevented proper array expansion in bash function
ORM layer already parameterizes — raw SQL string is template, not user input
Resolved SHA differs from expected — action maintainer force-pushed tag
